name: Evening meal window: gradual drop projected to hypo
description: Dinner eaten at 19:00 local injection. BG descends gradually from 9.1 (at injection) down through target zone at about 0.3 mmol/L per 10 min — not rapid enough to trigger `trend.urgent`, but steady enough that by the time BG crosses below target (~19:50 local, 110 min post-injection, still within meal window), the 30-min projection is at or below hypoFloor. This tests the safety override's projection path in the evening meal window. Without the safety override, the engine would stay silent until the meal window expires at 20:00, by which point BG is near hypoFloor with insulin still active — the exact silent-crash pattern we're trying to prevent.
